context: Tests whether the agent uses the --claude-code init flag (not just --agents) and correctly documents all four artifacts it installs: CLAUDE.md, the skill file, slash commands, and the optional PostToolUse hook.

checklist.name: --claude-code flag used
checklist.description: setup.sh contains `themis init --claude-code` (or `npx themis init --claude-code` / `bunx themis init --claude-code`) — NOT just `themis init --agents`

checklist.name: CLAUDE.md mentioned in notes
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md lists `CLAUDE.md` as a file installed by the initialization at the repo root

checklist.name: Skill file path mentioned
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md mentions `.claude/skills/themis/SKILL.md` (or `.claude/skills/themis/`) as an installed artifact

checklist.name: Slash commands mentioned
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md mentions `.claude/commands/` or the slash commands `themis-test`, `themis-generate`, `themis-migrate`, `themis-fix`

checklist.name: PostToolUse hook mentioned
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md mentions the `PostToolUse` hook or `scripts/claude-hook.js` as an optional component

checklist.name: generate command in setup.sh
checklist.description: setup.sh includes `themis generate src` or `themis generate src/` to create baseline tests

checklist.name: Skill auto-load behavior described
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md explains that the skill file auto-loads when the user asks to write, run, fix, or migrate tests

checklist.name: Hook feedback loop described
checklist.description: SETUP_NOTES.md explains that the PostToolUse hook runs Themis after edits and feeds failures back into the conversation
